task: Platform Milestone E — PR #17 review findings remediation
completed: P1: moved dashboard access token storage to memory-only, removed token localStorage usage, and switched refresh flow to cookie-based refresh
P1: updated auth API to set rotating refresh token as httpOnly+secure+sameSite=strict cookie on login/token exchange and refresh
P1: removed SDK realtime token leakage in SSE URL and WS protocol; WS now sends auth frame after connect
P1: split MCP server by SRP into transport/dispatcher/tools/index and added malformed JSON + invalid tool input handling
P1: registered Fastify CORS with configurable CORS_ORIGIN and credentials=true
Added regression tests for no dashboard token localStorage, no realtime token in URL, malformed JSON-RPC parse errors, invalid MCP tool params, and CORS preflight headers
Validated quality gates: pnpm test && pnpm lint
